build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turbo. Workspace packages linked with workspace:*. Uses vitest for tests.
test_framework: vitest with vi.fn() mocks. Tests co-located in __tests__/ or *.test.ts. Pattern: mock Prisma/external deps, test service logic.
verification_instructions: Run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm audit --audit-level=high. All must pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22, pnpm available. No Docker daemon needed for verification. Real external services (Kafka, MeiliSearch, Qdrant, Redis) are not available at runtime - all code must be testable with mocks.
contribution_requirements: From KIRO_AUTONOMOUS_NEXT_PHASES_PROMPT.md: (1) Never weaken global strictness (2) Prefer small, verifiable increments (3) Every phase must end with command output evidence (4) All quality gates must continue to pass (5) New features must have tests (6) Do not add placeholder systems unless behind feature flags
key_patterns: Backend apps use @quant/server-core createApp() Fastify pattern with typed routes. Services are classes taking Prisma/deps via constructor. Tests mock Prisma with vi.fn(). Frontend types defined in src/types/. Packages export from src/index.ts. Search uses SearchClient (MeiliSearch) + VectorClient (Qdrant) + HybridSearchEngine for fusion. Agent runtime in packages/agent-runtime has typed tools, safety classifier, execution engine, workflows.
directory_structure: 13 apps under apps/ (quantmail, quantchat, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantcalendar, quantmeet, quantube, quantneon, quantsync, quantedits, quantmax, quantads, quantai). 17 services under services/. 37+ packages under packages/. Each app has backend/ with app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/. Packages have src/ with index.ts barrel export.
